{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603212258462E6DDD0F501577EF56D2"}"},"total":6},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7559949861300405017","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺好看的[思考]，有些小山没有什么特点，但是还是很值得阅读！[送心]异兽们都很稀奇，有的恐怖[震惊]有的严肃[敬礼]还有的梦幻[舔屏]，推荐[我也强推][书架加一][已种草]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1760189931,"group_id":"7512364175268531262","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6r/NkaS/QmllO8zjMe5YvTNynJ5WIQ0X5x4DP+nWFdG","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4023818877143453","user_name":"约克兰的绿魔鬼"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4023818877143453","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7512364175268531262","book_info":{"abstract":"中国创世史诗，上古奇幻巨著！《山海经》是一部中国先秦至汉代早期成书的地理神话志怪类古籍，全书共十八卷，分为《山经》《海外经》《海内经》《大荒经》四大部分，记录了古人对山川地理、民族风俗、动植物、矿物资源、奇禽异兽以及神灵怪异的奇幻想象与原始地理知识。本次出版的版本采用白话文，方便零基础读者也能轻松理解古书内容。书中描绘如夸父逐日、精卫填海、刑天舞干戚、黄帝大战蚩尤等众多神话传说，记载了如应龙、九尾狐、夔牛、烛龙等大量奇异生物，是中华古代神话体系最丰富、最完整的文献之一。《山海经》兼具宗教祭祀、天文历法、地理物产、民间信仰与民族传说等多重信息，被誉为“古代百科全书”。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/cbfdbbf1ffd2038cd84c6351cce33b64~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"简读编辑组","author_id":"","book_id":"7512364175268531262","book_name":"山海经（彩图全解版）","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#600808","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"11.2万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":941,"name":"文学经典","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=941&name=文学经典&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":116,"name":"国学","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=116&name=国学&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7566853869901204505","read_count":"1546","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"69450"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"45","tags":"文学经典,国学","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/cbfdbbf1ffd2038cd84c6351cce33b64~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779289126&x-signature=WXfy3fO7LHZkwo74OpncEJmn3zg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"251"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603212258462E6DDD0F501577EF56D2"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":10,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":50,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":8318,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1104},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7580966397759161150","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"直接看《山海经》原文的话，没有图，想象力跟不上；而且生僻字也多。
看这本《山海经》的白话文版本，就可以解决古文难理解以及生僻字的问题。同时也可以看到精美的图片，增加阅读的趣味性。
总的来说，这本书很适合一读为快。
[书架加一][飞吻]","text_exts":[{"e":7,"s":4,"text":"山海经","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%B1%B1%E6%B5%B7%E7%BB%8F&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177410512677EF56D2%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227580966397759161150%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227512364175268531262%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%B1%B1%E6%B5%B7%E7%BB%8F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765085744,"group_id":"7512364175268531262","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"日读经典三万字，不以身行终是浅。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+k4+qI2+yEKSm28JWYhmCxnboJjMGTnD4oWjrCeQ78g","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/64152f57aa2042b9a08e440a4c8089ff~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776620226&x-signature=l4RNf5Rniua3lsjmD4Cp%2B6eILOE%3D","user_id":"3206632400497096","user_name":"爱好而读"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3206632400497096","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7512364175268531262","book_info":{"abstract":"中国创世史诗，上古奇幻巨著！《山海经》是一部中国先秦至汉代早期成书的地理神话志怪类古籍，全书共十八卷，分为《山经》《海外经》《海内经》《大荒经》四大部分，记录了古人对山川地理、民族风俗、动植物、矿物资源、奇禽异兽以及神灵怪异的奇幻想象与原始地理知识。本次出版的版本采用白话文，方便零基础读者也能轻松理解古书内容。书中描绘如夸父逐日、精卫填海、刑天舞干戚、黄帝大战蚩尤等众多神话传说，记载了如应龙、九尾狐、夔牛、烛龙等大量奇异生物，是中华古代神话体系最丰富、最完整的文献之一。《山海经》兼具宗教祭祀、天文历法、地理物产、民间信仰与民族传说等多重信息，被誉为“古代百科全书”。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/cbfdbbf1ffd2038cd84c6351cce33b64~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"简读编辑组","author_id":"","book_id":"7512364175268531262","book_
